description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the rustlang/rust:nightly Docker image and runs a before_script to update apt and install libcap2-dev, libzmq3-dev, and libzmq5. Define a single job named test:cargo in the default test stage that executes `rustc --version && cargo --version` followed by `cargo test --all --verbose`. No services, caches, artifacts, or special rules are required.
